title: cyclosorus decussatus
intro: Cyclosorus decussatus, also known as the Chinese ladder fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves, which have been used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Cyclosorus decussatus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The leaves can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, allowing for a range of herbal preparations to be made for medicinal purposes.
